globalTick.heading: Global tick
globalTick.intervalHint: How often the app recomputes solar position. Lamps fade smoothly between updates; 300 s is plenty.
globalTick.respectManualHint: If a user changes a lamp manually, the app pauses that lamp until it is switched off and back on.
globalTick.rangeError: Interval must be between 30 and 1800 seconds.

groups.heading: Groups
groups.intro: Groups bundle default values and contain the zones assigned to them. Moving a zone into another group adopts that group's values as the new defaults for the zone (per-key overrides on the zone are preserved).
groups.nightColorLabel: Coloured night light instead of Kelvin
groups.moveZonePrompt: — move a zone from another group here —

pair.name: Name
pair.groupsHint: Manage groups under Apps → Lumina → Configure.
pair.moveHint: After creating, move this device into the Homey-area you want it to control. All lights inside (recursively) will be managed adaptively.
pair.inheritHint: Empty = inherit from group. Enter a value = override.
